name: TG THERAPEUTICS, INC.
business: TG Therapeutics is a fully integrated, commercial stage, biotechnology company focused on the acquisition, development and commercialization of novel treatments for B-cell diseases. The company has received FDA approval for BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy) to treat adult patients with relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (RMS). The company also actively evaluates complementary products and technologies for in-licensing, partnership, acquisition and/or investment opportunities.
sellsTo: Adult patients with relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis

exposures.sentence: TG Therapeutics is a fully integrated, commercial stage, biotechnology company focused on the acquisition, development and commercialization of novel treatments for B-cell diseases.

catalysts.sentence: In January 2023, we announced the U.S. commercial launch of BRIUMVI, making it available to physicians and patients.

In August 2023, we entered into a commercialization agreement (the Commercialization Agreement) with Neuraxpharm Pharmaceuticals, S.L., a leading European specialty pharmaceutical company focused on the treatment of central nervous system (CNS) disorders, for the ex-U.S. commercialization of BRIUMVI.

catalysts.event: Commercial launch of BRIUMVI in the European Union
catalysts.sentence: In February 2024, we announced the commercial launch of BRIUMVI in the European Union (EU).

catalysts.event: Issuance of three additional patents for BRIUMVI
catalysts.sentence: In February 2024, we announced the issuance of three additional patents by the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) for BRIUMVI, which extended patent protection through 2042.

catalysts.event: Global exclusive license agreement with Precision for azer-cel
catalysts.sentence: In January 2024, we, through our wholly-owned subsidiary, TG Cell Therapy, Inc., entered into a global exclusive license agreement with Precision to develop and commercialize azer-cel for autoimmune diseases and all other non-oncology indications.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of IND for azer-cel in progressive MS
catalysts.sentence: In August 2024, we announced FDA clearance of the IND for azer-cel for the treatment of progressive forms of MS.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial for subcutaneous ublituximab
catalysts.sentence: In August 2024, we announced the initiation of a Phase 1 clinical trial evaluating subcutaneous ublituximab in patients with RMS.

catalysts.event: Presentation of five-year data from ULTIMATE I & II trials
catalysts.sentence: In September 2024 we presented new five-year data from the ULTIMATE I & II Phase 3 trials evaluating BRIUMVI (ublituximab-xiiy) in patients with RMS, at the 2024 European Committee for Treatment and Research in Multiple Sclerosis (ECTRIMS) annual meeting.

catalysts.event: First patients enrolled in myasthenia gravis clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we announced the first patients with myasthenia gravis (MG) have been enrolled in a clinical trial evaluating ublituximab.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed with azer-cel in progressive MS Phase 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we announced the first patient with progressive multiple sclerosis has been dosed with azer-cel in a Phase 1 trial.

catalysts.event: Enrollment commenced in Phase 3 pivotal program for subcutaneous ublituximab
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we announced enrollment commenced in the Phase 3 pivotal program evaluating subcutaneous ublituximab.

catalysts.event: Presentation of six-year data from ULTIMATE I & II trials
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025 we presented new six-year data from the ULTIMATE I & II Phase 3 trials in patients with RMS at the 2025 ECTRIMS annual meeting.

catalysts.event: Completion of prior share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we announced the completion of our previously authorized $100 million share repurchase program, which was initially announced in August 2024 (the Prior Share Repurchase Program).

catalysts.event: Authorization of new $100 million share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, the Board authorized and approved a new share repurchase program (the 2025 Share Repurchase Program) for up to $100 million of the currently outstanding shares of our common stock.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment in Phase 3 ENHANCE trial randomized cohort
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced completion of enrollment in the randomized cohort of the Phase 3 ENHANCE trial evaluating a consolidated day 1 and day 15 dosing schedule for IV BRIUMVI in people with RMS.
In February 2026, we announced that the Phase 3 trial was more than approximately 75% enrolled.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly 1 million people are living with MS in the United States and over 2.3 million people worldwide are living with MS.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that nearly 1 million people are living with MS in the United States and over 2.3 million people world-wide are living with MS.
